Done. Created `scripts/usage-today.mjs` (new file, +92 lines); no other files touched.

- Arg-parsing mirrors `tool-failures.mjs` (`argValue`, `--data-dir`, `--json`, `MIXDOG_HOME`/`MIXDOG_DATA_DIR` resolution, cwd `.mixdog` + home fallback).
- Filters `kind==='usage'` rows with `ts >= localMidnight()` (local-time midnight), aggregates per `model`: calls, input(`inputTokens`), cached(`cacheReadTokens`), output(`outputTokens`), `costUsd`; sorted by cost desc, plus a `TOTAL` grand-total line. `--json` emits structured output.

Verify: `node --check scripts/usage-today.mjs` → CHECK_OK. Ran once — default env: `usage today: 0 calls` (sources none, env points elsewhere). With `MIXDOG_DATA_DIR=C:/Users/tempe/.mixdog/data`: 188 calls today across 5 models, `TOTAL calls=188 input=28818947 cached=37106410 output=397314 costUsd=50.544838`.

Note: "cached" maps to `cacheReadTokens` (cache-read input tokens); `cacheWriteTokens`/`promptTokens` are not surfaced.

Done. Added `--group day` to `scripts/tool-failures.mjs` only.

Changes:
- `tool-failures.mjs:22-23` — parse `--group`, `groupDay = groupArg === 'day'`.
- `:65-74` — `dayLabel(ts)` helper → local `YYYY-MM-DD` (null for invalid ts).
- `:119-125` — build `byDay` from `rows` (post `--since/--tool/--agent/--category`, pre-limit), only when `groupDay`.
- `:127-146` — JSON path refactored to a variable; adds `days` (chronological) only when `groupDay`, so absent-case output is byte-identical.
- `:160` — text `days:` line printed only when `groupDay`.

Verification (`node --check` passed):
- Without `--group`: no `days` line / no `days` JSON key — unchanged.
- With `--group day` on a temp fixture (Jan 2 ×2, Jan 3 ×1, local): text `days: 2024-01-02:2, 2024-01-03:1`; JSON `"days": {"2024-01-02":2,"2024-01-03":1}`. Chronological, local-calendar correct (ts 01:00Z counted as local Jan 2).

Note: day counts use the full filtered set (`rows`), not the `--limit`-trimmed `recent`, matching the brief's "after all existing filters (--since/--tool/--agent/--category)" wording.

Done. Created `scripts/lib/args.mjs` and refactored both scripts.

Diff summary:
- `scripts/lib/args.mjs` (new, +15): exports `argValue(name, fallback=null)` and `hasFlag(name)`, semantics identical to the removed local copies (supports `--name value` and `--name=value`).
- `scripts/patch-replay.mjs` (+1/−9): added `import { argValue, hasFlag } from './lib/args.mjs'`, deleted local `argValue`+`hasFlag`.
- `scripts/session-diag.mjs` (+1/−8): added `import { argValue } from './lib/args.mjs'`, deleted local `argValue` (file has no local `hasFlag`; its `--json`/`--tree` use `process.argv.includes` directly — left untouched to preserve behavior).

Verification: `node --check` passed on all three files (CHECK_OK). `node scripts/session-diag.mjs --json --limit 1` ran clean, printed `[]` (DIAG_OK).

Risk/note: `node scripts/patch-replay.mjs --list` fails at runtime with `ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND: Cannot find package 'diff'` — a pre-existing missing-dependency issue via its `executePatchTool` import chain (node_modules not installed), unrelated to this refactor; the file itself passes `node --check`.
